dataset_name: Tamil Nadu SIR constituency-wise elector statistics
roll_type: Special Intensive Revision (SIR) final electoral rolls
method_note: The official Tamil Nadu SIR 2026 dataset/schema was confirmed via OpenCity/ECI metadata, but the raw CSV was blocked for direct fetch from this environment. Constituency-level row values were extracted from public OneIndia constituency pages. The sum of all 234 constituencies matches the official statewide totals exactly.
